global_description: A medium-sized bird with a sleek, streamlined body and a distinctive crest on its head. It has a predominantly soft gray-brown plumage with a silky texture, accented by a black mask around the eyes and a yellow-tipped tail. The wings feature striking white and red markings.

part_details.head: Smooth, gray-brown with a prominent pointed crest and a black mask around the eyes.
part_details.body: Streamlined, covered in soft gray-brown feathers with a silky texture.
part_details.wings: Gray-brown with distinctive white and red markings.
part_details.tail: Short, ending in a bright yellow tip.

spatial_relations: The pointed crest is located on top of the head.
The black mask surrounds the eyes.
The yellow tip is at the end of the tail.
White and red markings are on the wings.
